item.title: Russell Brand Says He Had 'Exploitative' Sex with 16-Year-Old Girl When He Was 30
item.description: Brand is currently facing multiple charges of rape and sexual assault in the U.K.

item.title: Mariska Hargitay Says She 'Burst Out in Tears' over Christopher Meloni's “Law & Order: Organized Crime” Cancellation
item.description: 'Law & Order: Organized Crime' was canceled after five seasons on April 16

item.title: Prince Louis Shows Off His Sporty Side in Beachy Birthday Video: '8 Is Great!'
item.description: The young royal played cricket, jumped into the sea and ran fast in the footage filmed during a family vacation in Cornwall

item.title: How Did Hulk Hogan Die? Inside the WWE Star's Quiet Health Struggles at the End of His Life
item.description: Twelve-time world champion wrestler Hulk Hogan died in July 2025

item.title: I Walked 20,000+ Steps Ache-Free in These Adidas Sneakers at Tokyo Disney — Grab a Pair on Sale at Amazon Right Now
item.description: Jessica Alba has worn these exact platform shoes, too
